sections.description: Hero area with full-width image and rate quote CTA

sequences.description: Full-width image of kids running in hallway with overlay heading 'Thinking of buying or refinancing?'
Centered heading 'Get started with a personalized rate quote', description paragraph, and two primary CTA buttons (Home purchase, Refinance)

sections.description: Homebuying starts here - four icon-based promo items

sequences.description: Section heading 'Homebuying starts here'

Four items displayed vertically/in grid, each with a colored gradient icon, heading, description paragraph, and a CTA link (See what you can afford, Shop for homes, Learn how to buy your first home, Ready to apply?)
Secondary button 'Learn more about homebuying'

sections.description: Explore the benefits of refinancing - four icon-based promo items

sequences.description: Section heading 'Explore the benefits of refinancing'

Four items displayed vertically/in grid, each with a colored gradient icon, heading, description paragraph, and a CTA link (See if you could lower your payment, Estimate your home's value, Tap into your home's equity, Apply for your refinance)
Secondary button 'Learn more about refinancing'

sections.description: Get more with your mortgage - three promotional cards with images

sequences.description: Section heading 'Get more with your mortgage'
Three cards in a grid layout, each with a large illustration image, heading, description text, and a text link CTA ($10,000 down payment grant, Up to $5,000 for closing costs, Relationship benefits)

sections.description: Grow your knowledge with our mortgage tools - four text-only promo items

sequences.description: Section heading 'Grow your knowledge with our mortgage tools'

Four items displayed vertically/in grid, text-only (no icons), each with heading, description paragraph, and a CTA link (Mortgage calculators, Today's mortgage and refinance rates, Learning center, Manage your account)
Section heading 'Common mortgage questions'

Four expandable/collapsible question-answer pairs (How much home can I afford?, What parts of my finances does a mortgage lender review?, What is the minimum down payment for conventional FHA and VA loans?, What other costs are part of my mortgage?)
Secondary button 'More home loan FAQs'
Section heading 'Hear from our customers'
Two customer testimonial quotes displayed side by side, each with quoted text and customer name (Despina K., Kenneth F.)

sections.description: Talk to a mortgage consultant - contact information cards

sequences.description: Section heading 'Talk to a mortgage consultant'
Four contact information cards in a grid (Buying or Refinancing with phone/hours, Account servicing with phone/hours, Let us contact you with CTA button, Find a consultant with search CTA)

sections.description: Quick help links and legal disclaimers

sequences.description: Heading 'Quick help' with a list of four utility links (Finish a saved application, Sign on to manage your account, Customer help and payment options, Voice a concern)
Legal disclaimer paragraphs about loan terms and servicemember relief

blockCollection.name: Table
blockCollection.purpose: Organize tabular data into rows and columns

blockCollection.name: Columns
blockCollection.purpose: Present content side by side in multiple columns

blockCollection.name: Cards
blockCollection.purpose: Showcase distinct pieces of information in card-based layout with images/text

blockCollection.name: Accordion
blockCollection.purpose: Collapsible sections for FAQ or grouped content

blockCollection.name: Hero
blockCollection.purpose: Prominent image with headline and CTA at top of page

blockCollection.name: Tabs
blockCollection.purpose: Multiple content sections accessible by tab selection

blockCollection.name: Embed
blockCollection.purpose: Embed external video or social media content
